config_files.pytest_ini_content:
[pytest]
# Pytest configuration for test repository

# Test discovery patterns
python_files = test_*.py
python_classes = Test*
python_functions = test_*

# Test paths
testpaths = test_repository

# Output options
addopts = 
    -v
    --strict-markers
    --tb=short
    --disable-warnings
    --color=yes

# Markers
markers =
    unit: Unit tests
    integration: Integration tests
    e2e: End-to-end tests
    slow: Slow running tests
    asyncio: Async tests (automatically applied to async test
